description_long: This object is a compact, futuristic shotgun with a predominantly matte black finish and angular, geometric contours. The body is boxy and robust, with a short, thick barrel and a distinct, ergonomic pistol grip that features subtle purple accents. The receiver and main housing are constructed from what appears to be metal, with some polymer or composite elements for the grip and possibly the fore-end. The trigger guard is integrated into the grip area, forming a protective, squared enclosure. There are no visible external magazines, pumps, or levers, suggesting a streamlined, semi-automatic design. The overall appearance is tactical and modern, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability and durability are prioritized.
description: A compact, angular black shotgun with a pistol grip and squared trigger guard, featuring subtle purple accents and a modern, tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the boxy receiver, short barrel, and ergonomic pistol grip with purple accents.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the muzzle and the width of the barrel, with the grip and trigger guard visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the same angular body and grip details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and the end of the grip, with the squared trigger guard visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, integrated into the grip, medium-sized with a solid, protective enclosure
